info.title: Qadam
info.description: REST API specification for tje qadam. all protected endpoints MUST require a Bearer token in the Authorization header. All responses are wrapped in { data, success, message? }.

auth.note: Obtain token via POST /auth/login or POST /auth/register

login.description: Login with email and password. Returns access token + refresh token.

register.description: Register a new student account. studentId must be a valid NU student ID.

logout.description: Invalidate the current access + refresh token pair.

refreshToken.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new access token.

getProfile.description: Get the currently authenticated user's profile.

updateProfile.description: Update editable profile fields. studentId and email domain are read-only.

forgotPassword.description: Send a password reset link to the user's email.

getBuildings.description: Get all campus buildings with coordinates and accessibility info.

data.name: Block 1 - Sciences
data.description: Main science building with laboratories and lecture halls

data.name: Block 2 - Engineering
data.description: Engineering and technology building

data.name: Block 3 - Business School
data.description: Graduate School of Business

data.name: Library
data.description: Main university library with study spaces

data.name: Student Center
data.description: Student services, cafeterias, and recreation

data.name: Dormitory A
data.description: Student residential building

data.name: Sports Complex
data.description: Gymnasium, pool, and sports facilities

data.name: Administration Building
data.description: University administration offices

getBuilding.description: Get a single building by ID.

data.name: Library
data.description: Main university library with study spaces

getRoomsByBuilding.description: Get all rooms inside a building.

search.description: Search buildings and rooms by name or description.

buildings.name: Library
buildings.description: Main university library with study spaces

getNearby.description: Get buildings within a given radius (meters) of a GPS coordinate.

calculateRoute.description: Calculate a walking route between two GPS points on campus. preference controls route type: shortest = fewest meters, accessible = ramps + elevators only, least_crowded = avoids busy areas.

instructions: Head east along the main walkway
Library entrance is on your left

getSavedRoutes.description: Get all routes saved by the authenticated user.

saveRoute.description: Save a previously calculated route for quick access.

reroute.description: Recalculate an active route from the user's current GPS position.

instructions: Continue east on the main path

getEvents.description: Get all campus events. Filter by category and/or date range.

data.title: Spring Career Fair 2026
data.description: Annual career fair featuring top employers from Kazakhstan and international companies.

data.title: AI & Machine Learning Workshop
data.description: Hands-on workshop on the latest AI technologies and their applications.

data.title: Nauryz Celebration
data.description: Traditional Kazakh New Year celebration with music, food, and cultural performances.

data.title: Basketball Tournament
data.description: Inter-department basketball competition. Come support your team!

data.title: Guest Lecture: Future of Renewable Energy
data.description: Distinguished lecture by Dr. Sarah Chen on sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Movie Night: Interstellar
data.description: Free outdoor movie screening. Bring your blankets!

getEvent.description: Get a single event by ID.

data.title: Spring Career Fair 2026
data.description: Annual career fair featuring top employers from Kazakhstan and international companies.

registerForEvent.description: Register the authenticated user for an event. Only valid when isRegistrationRequired = true.

getDiscounts.description: Get all student discounts. Filter by category.

queryParams._note: Optional. Omit to get all categories.

data.title: 15% Off All Beverages
data.description: Show your student ID to get 15% off any drink at Starbucks campus location.
data.terms: Valid only at campus location. Cannot be combined with other offers.

data.title: Student Movie Tickets - 50% Off
data.description: Half price movie tickets for students on weekdays.
data.terms: Valid Monday-Thursday. Not valid on holidays or special screenings.

data.title: 10% Off Electronics
data.description: Student discount on laptops, tablets, and accessories.
data.terms: Valid with student ID. Some exclusions apply.

data.title: Student Membership - 30% Off
data.description: Discounted monthly gym membership for NU students.
data.terms: Valid student ID required. 6-month minimum commitment.

data.title: 20% Off Large Pizzas
data.description: Student special on all large pizzas.
data.terms: Delivery and takeout only. Valid after 6 PM.

data.title: Student Travel Discount - 25% Off
data.description: Discounted train tickets for students traveling within Kazakhstan.
data.terms: Valid with student ID. Economy class only.

data.title: Free Coffee Upgrade
data.description: Get a free size upgrade on any coffee drink.

getDiscount.description: Get a single discount by ID.

data.title: 15% Off All Beverages
data.description: Show your student ID to get 15% off any drink at Starbucks campus location.
data.terms: Valid only at campus location. Cannot be combined with other offers.

verifyEligibility.description: Check if a student is eligible for a discount (e.g. active enrollment, specific year).

getReviews.description: Get reviews. Filter by targetId and/or targetType.

queryParams._note: Both params are optional. targetType values: building, room, cafe, service

data.comment: Great study environment! The 3rd floor is perfect for quiet studying. Plenty of outlets and natural light.
Good food options and reasonable prices. Can get crowded during lunch hours though.
Room is nice but booking system is confusing. Wish it was easier to reserve.
Excellent facilities! The swimming pool is well maintained and the gym has modern equipment.
Labs are well-equipped. Sometimes elevators are slow during class transitions.

createReview.description: Create a new review. The backend should auto-calculate sentiment from rating (>=4 = positive, 3 = neutral, <=2 = negative) or accept it from client.

requestBody.comment: Amazing place to study, highly recommend the 3rd floor.

data.comment: Amazing place to study, highly recommend the 3rd floor.

markHelpful.description: Increment the helpful count on a review. Each user can mark helpful once per review.

reportReview.description: Report a review for inappropriate content.

getCourses.description: Get the authenticated student's courses. Filter by semester.

getAcademicPlan.description: Get the authenticated student's academic plan (GPA, credits, standing, graduation info).

getSchedule.description: Get the student's class schedule. Pass a date to get classes for that specific day.

queryParams._note: Optional. ISO date string YYYY-MM-DD. Omit to get full schedule.

getEvents.description: Get the authenticated user's personal planner events. Filter by date range.

queryParams._note: Both optional. ISO date strings YYYY-MM-DD.

data.title: Study Session - ML Exam
data.description: Review chapters 5-8

data.title: Career Fair
data.description: Bring resume copies

createEvent.description: Create a new personal planner event.

data.title: Study Session - Finals
data.description: Review all chapters

updateEvent.description: Update an existing planner event. Only send fields that need to change.

data.title: Study Session - ML Exam
data.description: Review chapters 5-8

deleteEvent.description: Delete a planner event by ID.

getStudyRooms.description: Get all study rooms. Filter by building and/or availability.

getRoomAvailability.description: Get available time slots for a room on a specific date.

bookRoom.description: Book a study room for a specific date and time slot.

getUserBookings.description: Get all room bookings for the authenticated user.

getSettings.description: Get the authenticated user's app settings.

updateSettings.description: Update user settings. Send only the fields that changed.

notifications._note: This endpoint group is not yet in api.ts but is needed for the NotificationsScreen.

getNotifications.description: Get all notifications for the authenticated user.

data.title: Upcoming Event
data.message: Tech Talk: AI in Healthcare starts in 1 hour at the Main Auditorium

data.title: Class Reminder
data.message: Your CSCI 408 class starts in 15 minutes at Building A, Room 101

data.title: New Discount Available
data.message: Get 20% off at Campus Cafe! Valid until the end of this month.

data.title: Navigation Update
data.message: Building B entrance is temporarily closed. Alternative routes are available.

markAllRead.description: Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user.

markRead.description: Mark a single notification as read.

Building.name: string
Building.category: academic | residential | dining | library | sports | admin | other

Room.name: string
Room.type: classroom | lab | office | study_room | restroom | elevator | stairs | other

CampusEvent.title: string
CampusEvent.category: academic | social | sports | cultural | career | other

Discount.title: string
Discount.discountPercentage: number (0 = no percentage, show as gift)
Discount.category: food | entertainment | shopping | services | travel | other

Course.name: string
Course.grade: string | null (A, A-, B+, B, B-, C+, C, C-, D+, D, F)

CourseSchedule.day: monday | tuesday | wednesday | thursday | friday | saturday | sunday

PlannerEvent.title: string
PlannerEvent.type: class | study | meeting | event | reminder | other
